description:
As a new visitor to ParaBank
  I want to register a new account
  And then sign in with that account
  So that I can access my account details and view my balance

elements.name: Successful user registration with dynamically generated data

steps.name: I navigate to the ParaBank home page
I fill in the registration form with valid random user data
I should see a successful registration confirmation message
the new user should be registered with the generated credentials

elements.name: Successful login with the registered user account

steps.name: I navigate to the ParaBank home page
I log in with the registered user credentials
I should be logged in successfully
I should see the account overview page
I should log the account balance displayed on the page

name: ParaBank User Registration and Login
